name: Deploy Azure VM with Keycloak + Postgres + Nginx

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:

  # 1️⃣ Test Azure Connectivity
  azure-login:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      azure-logged-in: ${{ steps.login.outputs.succeeded }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Login to Azure
        id: login
        uses: azure/login@v2
        with:
          creds: ${{ secrets.Terraform_SA }}

      - name: Test Azure Connection
        run: |
          az account show

  # 2️⃣ Terraform Provisioning
  terraform-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: azure-login
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Terraform
        uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3

      - name: Terraform Init
        run: terraform init

      - name: Terraform Plan
        run: terraform plan -out=tfplan

      - name: Terraform Apply
        run: terraform apply -auto-approve tfplan

      - name: Output VM Public IP
        id: tfoutput
        run: echo "VM_IP=$(terraform output -raw vm_public_ip)" >> $GITHUB_ENV

  # 3️⃣ Ansible Configuration
  ansible-configure:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: terraform-deploy
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Ansible and dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt update
          sudo apt install -y ansible python3-pip
          pip3 install --user "docker"

      - name: Setup SSH Key
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          echo "${{ secrets.VM_PRIVATE_KEY }}" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa

      - name: Run Ansible Playbook
        run: |
          ansible-playbook -i "${{ env.VM_IP }}," deploy.yml -u <VM_USER> --private-key ~/.ssh/id_rsa
